title: THE RIDGE APARTMENTS - 211info
text: RIDGE APARTMENTS THE RIDGE APARTMENTS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers 80 affordable apartment units. 3340 SE Harbor Drive Lincoln City, OR 97367 Eligibility: Individuals making 50%-60% of the Area Median Income (AMI) Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-4:30pm Email (541) 996-7667 . Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (541) 996-7667 Main phone (541) 996-9393 FAX Main phone (541) 996-7667 Ridge Apts Manager [email protected] FAX (541) 996-9393 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in or call for more information FEES: $45 application fee. Deposit of 1 month rent plus prorated rent. Additional fees may apply. DOCUMENTS: Proof of income AREA SERVED: Lincoln County TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: From Highway 101, turn east on SE 32nd Street to Fleet Street, then turn left on SE Harbor Drive. City bus stops less than one block away. Services: Government Subsidized Private Rental Housing Listings Low Income/Subsidized Private Rental Housing If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
